content.en:
"I've seen the ancestor!"

Li Yang said respectfully.

Ye Tian Ancestor was such an existence, he was not qualified to see it in the past, but now he can get in close contact, and his heart is naturally extremely excited.

Ye Tian stared at Li Yang and said, "Li Yang, your Eternal Dao Seed has been damaged, if it is under normal circumstances, it is almost impossible to recover, the price paid is too great, and even if it recovers, it will leave sequelae, and it is impossible to recover to the extent of true intact." But I have a way to help you recover the Eternal Dao seed, and I need your cooperation. "

"Ancestor, I'm willing to cooperate!"

Li Yang knew that he was being used as an experiment by Ye Tian Ancestor, but as long as he could restore his Eternal Dao Species, he was willing to use it as an experiment.

Then.

Ye Tian reached into Li Yang's body with one hand and touched Li Yang's Eternal Dao Seed.

During the whole process, Li Yang did not resist.

Then, a scene that shocked him happened~.

I saw that Ye Tian had urged the newly created extra-dimensional technique, and under the extra-dimensional power emanating from this extra-dimensional technique, Li Yang's eternal Dao seed was actually recovering rapidly.

This recovery speed was at a speed that was visible to the naked eye, and in almost a few breaths, Li Yang's Eternal Dao Seed actually recovered-as before.

"That's it!"

Ye Tian said.

Li Yang was stunned and didn't know what to say.

In fact, in this experiment, he was still a little worried, thinking that he would be very miserable or suffer great pain, so that he had the slightest hope of repairing the Eternal Dao Seed.

As a result, after a few breaths, it recovered.

What kind of means is this?

"Thank you, Ancestor!"

Li Yang said excitedly.

With his background, the Eternal Dao Seed has recovered, and it won't be long before he has a way to become a realm god, and there is hope for him to become a mid-level realm god in the future.

Subsequently, Li Yang left.

And Ye Tian asked other Eternal Dao Species of the Terran to come over, and he used this new Extradimensional Technique to continuously repair their Eternal Dao Species, allowing them to return to normal.

Soon after, these people of the Terrans all regained their eternal Dao species.

In this way, in the future, the human race will have a lot more ordinary realm gods, beginner realm gods, and even middle-level realm gods.

Of course, Ye Tian also made these people make an Eternal Dao Seed Oath, so that his healing methods would not be leaked out.

Otherwise, once it spreads, the supreme forces can easily deduce that he has used extradimensional techniques to restore the eternal Dao species of these people, and then he will be targeted by the supreme forces.

For the supreme forces, no matter how strong his combat power is, it makes no sense to fight beyond the ranks, even if he becomes a peak realm god, it is meaningless.

Without mastering extradimensional means, it is not enough to contend with supreme forces.

And if he has mastered the extradimensional technique, even if he uses the extradimensional thing to display it, it is still very terrifying, and he will be targeted by them, and he will even be invited to hand over the extradimensional technique.

Even if the extradimensional technique he created was only suitable for the realm gods who fused the wood fragments of the Kun Realm, it still had reference value for the supreme forces.

Therefore, the supreme forces will definitely yearn for such an extradimensional inheritance.

......

"This time, I used these people to experiment with the effect of this extradimensional technique, which is very good, even if it is an eternal Dao species of a mid-level realm god, it can be easily recovered. This extra-dimensional technique can not only restore the Eternal Dao Species, but all kinds of injuries can be easily recovered, and if it is used in battle, it can even make the physical body immortal!"

Ye Tian muttered.

This extradimensional object is capable of restoring the entire Eternal Realm, and for an individual, the ability to recover is terrifying.

Therefore, the power of recovery is the first characteristic of this extradimensional thing.

Because of this, Ye Tiancai studied in this aspect, and he was able to create such an extradimensional technique.

"Now we're going to have to give this extradimensional art a name. "

Ye Tian thought about it carefully and finally took a name. []

【Extradimensional Healing】

The name is ordinary, but apt.

With this extra-dimensional healing technique, Ye Tian's combat power didn't seem to have improved much, but his life-preserving ability and staying power were much stronger.

Moreover, he can also cast the Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique, and use the power of the Transcendent Dimension to bestow on it, even if it is not as good as those attack-type Transcendent Techniques, but it is far beyond the attack power of the Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique, and for the high-level peak realm god, it is enough to kill him in an instant.

It's enough for the time being, and you don't need to worry about the aggressive type.

Later, he can continue to create a second extradimensional technique, and the second extradimensional technique can be studied in the direction of attack, and it will definitely be created, but it will take more time.

......

Time flies.

Gradually, the billion-dollar solstice era passed.

In such a long period of time, Ye Tian had obtained too many resources from the Endless Seam Realm, and these resources had cultivated too many realm gods for the human race.

Even Ye Tian himself used the resources here to continuously refine the Eternal Dao Species, and now the Eternal Dao Species were very close to the limit.

And he finally created the second extradimensional technique, which is an offensive extradimensional technique.

This extra-dimensional technique was named by him as the extra-dimensional vine, which condenses a vine with the power of extra-dimensionality, and has the effect of binding and attacking.

He used this extradimensional technique to attack his other replica bodies, and he could penetrate the flesh in an instant, shattering and killing them, and the lethality was very terrifying, five times that of attacking with the power of extradimensional power alone.

Moreover, it can also bind the enemy, which is very scary.

After possessing this second extradimensional realm, Ye Tian's current strength was comparable to that of the peak realm gods who had condensed ten Eternal Realm Spirits, and he was even sure to defeat them.

A few more days passed.

this day.

The Terran's Endless Rift Realm was still exposed after all, but it was good to be able to hide it for so long.

This exposure was not deliberately leaked by the Terran Bounded God, but that the Terran grew too fast, and too many resources appeared out of thin air, which attracted the attention of other top forces, which targeted the Terran.

A high-level pinnacle realm god sneaked into the vicinity of the Terran Endless Realm Rift and spied on it, only then did he discover the clue.

By the time Ye Tian found out, it was already a step late, and the top force already knew about it.

Now, more top forces know about it, and they have joined forces to ask the Terrans to take the initiative to give up the ownership of this Endless Seam Realm, so that other top forces can also participate.
